summary: Pin Kubernetes workloads to the image tag that was pushed to the demo registry.
command: kubectl -n rx-demo set image deploy/api-gateway api-gateway="$DEMO_REGISTRY/api-gateway:$DEMO_TAG" && kubectl -n rx-demo set image deploy/legacy-sync-worker worker="$DEMO_REGISTRY/legacy-sync-worker:$DEMO_TAG" && kubectl -n rx-demo set image deploy/read-model-projection worker="$DEMO_REGISTRY/read-model-projection:$DEMO_TAG" && kubectl -n rx-demo set image deploy/rx-ui rx-ui="$DEMO_REGISTRY/rx-ui:$DEMO_TAG"
